decision: Delay enterprise beta rollout by 2 weeks
reason: API instability and incomplete permission-aware indexing validation
follow_up: Complete regression testing and return to the enterprise beta gate on June 15.

decision: Split the customer API cutover into two migration windows
reason: The full cutover rehearsal exceeded the maintenance window by 47 minutes
follow_up: Review rollback rehearsal results and finalize the first cutover window by June 9.

decision: Proceed with a 500-customer design partner beta
reason: Crash-free sessions reached 99.6 percent and remaining telemetry gaps are monitorable
follow_up: Confirm Android push telemetry alerts before external beta release.

decision: Request a temporary dual-run budget exception
reason: Rollback coverage must remain active through the second customer API cutover wave
follow_up: Obtain Finance and executive approval by June 11.
